description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a minimalist rectangular design and a flat roof. The exterior is finished in a light gray concrete or stucco, giving it a sleek, contemporary appearance. The front features a covered carport with space for two vehicles, one blue and one white, and a small landscaped area with trees and plants. Windows are arranged asymmetrically, with a mix of narrow vertical and larger rectangular panes, and the main entryway is recessed beneath the carport. The rear of the house includes a partially open balcony on the upper floor, and the property is bordered by a tiled pavement. The overall structure is solid and geometric, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, light gray exterior, covered carport, and asymmetrical windows. The design is minimalist with clean lines and landscaped surroundings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered carport with two parked vehicles, main entryway, and landscaping with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid gray wall, minimal windows, and a single tree near the edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open balcony on the upper floor, tiled pavement, and additional entry points.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with more visible windows, blue vehicle in the carport, and two palm trees in the landscaping.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entry beneath a covered carport, minimal steps, no porch, and clean modern lines.
